creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to mario.g.pavlov from comment #9)
> Created attachment 148157 [details]
> poudriere portrac log
> 
> Please find attached the log as per your instructions.
> Sorry if you caused you any trouble or inconvenience.
> Please let me know if there's anything else I can do.


I was going to reply that while it was slightly inconvenient, I know you were just trying to please.

And then I just noticed you xz-compressed a 22kb.  *face palm*

We cant' review logs that are compressed via a browser.   Please upload them as they are.
